{{- $link := .Destination -}} {{- if strings.HasSuffix $link ".md" -}} {{- $cleanLink := strings.TrimPrefix "./" (strings.TrimSuffix ".md" $link) -}} {{- with .Page.GetPage $cleanLink -}} {{- $link = .RelPermalink -}} {{- end -}} {{- else if strings.Contains $link "/static/" -}} {{- $parts := split $link "/static/" -}} {{- if gt (len $parts) 1 -}} {{- $link = printf "/%s" (index $parts 1) | relURL -}} {{- end -}} {{- else if strings.HasPrefix $link "/" -}} {{- $link = $link | relURL -}} {{- end -}} {{ .Text | safeHTML }}
